title: Pungent Southern Thai Duck Curry
description: A spicy and juicy Thai dish featuring duck, this curry is a nostalgic reminder of Southern Thai cuisine, simmered to perfection in a Korean brass bowl. It is a raw-friendly dish that can be served with steamed rice.
instructions: Heat the oil in a Korean brass bowl over medium heat.
Add the sliced bird's eye chilies and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the duck pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, palm sugar, and lime juice, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the chopped Thai basil and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season the curry with salt to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional Thai basil if desired.
